name: Raymond Spruance
longDesc: Raymond Spruance remporte Midway en juin 1942 à la tête de la Task Force 16 et commande la 5e flotte à Philippine Sea (« Great Marianas Turkey Shoot »). En WC4, carte navale tier-S or duo idéal avec Nimitz pour verrouiller le Pacifique.

skills.name: Efficient Bombardment
skills.desc: When commanding a ship unit, air force units and missiles attack the enemy and deal damage + 50%.

skills.name: Inspection
skills.desc: After commanding an airforce unit to attack, the target gains the terrified state with a reduced counterattack rate of 60% for 1 turn.

skills.name: Airforce Leader
skills.desc: 24% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding air units

skills.name: Sailor
skills.desc: Counter attack +12% when attacked by the enemy at sea

skills.name: Carpet Bombing
skills.desc: Damage +24% to the defending forces in the city when air-raiding

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Raymond Spruance won Midway in June 1942 leading Task Force 16 and commanded Fifth Fleet at the 'Great Marianas Turkey Shoot'. In WC4 a tier-S gold navy card that pairs perfectly with Nimitz to lock down the Pacific.
longDescDe: Raymond Spruance gewann im Juni 1942 als Befehlshaber der Task Force 16 die Schlacht um Midway und führte die 5. Flotte beim „Großen Marianen-Putenschießen“. Im WC4 eine S-Klasse-Gold-Marinekarte, die sich mit Nimitz ideal ergänzt, um den Pazifik zu dominieren.
